Code fragment: public final TableField<NodesStatisticsRecord, Double> BLOCK_COUNT = createField(DSL.name("block_count"), SQLDataType.DOUBLE, this, "");
Explanation: The 'block_count' column uses DOUBLE which can cause precision loss for exact values. If this represents a count that should be exact, consider using BIGINT or INTEGER; if it needs decimal precision, use DECIMAL or NUMERIC instead.

Using LIKE with wildcards on both sides ('%searchTerm%') for searching IP addresses performs a full-text search which cannot use indexes efficiently. Consider using a dedicated full-text search engine, or if searching for IP prefixes, use a prefix search pattern ('searchTerm%') instead.
